new_classes.label_en: Plum, pear or cherry fruit mash (fermented)
new_classes.label_de: Vergärte Maische aus Pflaumen, Birnen oder Kirschen
new_classes.definition_en: Fermented mash of plums, pears or cherries used as the sole raw material for the production of plum, pear or cherry spirit (Slivovitz, Pálinka-type) under CN subheadings 2208 90 33 and 2208 90 38.

new_classes.label_en: Plum, pear or cherry fermented mash distillation process
new_classes.label_de: Destillation aus vergorener Pflaumen-, Birnen- oder Kirschmaische
new_classes.definition_en: Distillation process in which only fermented mash of plums, pears or cherries is used as raw material, producing plum spirit, pear spirit or cherry spirit classified under CN subheadings 2208 90 33 and 2208 90 38.

new_classes.label_en: Plum, pear or cherry spirit in containers ≤ 2 L (subheading 2208 90 33)
new_classes.label_de: Pflaumen-, Birnen- oder Kirschbranntwein in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von ≤ 2 L (Unterposition 2208 90 33)
new_classes.definition_en: Alcoholic beverage obtained exclusively by distillation of fermented mash of plums, pears or cherries, presented in containers of a nominal capacity not exceeding 2 litres, classified under CN subheading 2208 90 33.

new_classes.label_en: Plum, pear or cherry fruit origin quality (spirit derived exclusively from fermented plum, pear or cherry mash)
new_classes.label_de: Herkunftsqualität Pflaumen, Birnen oder Kirschen (Branntwein ausschließlich aus vergorener Pflaumen-, Birnen- oder Kirschmaische gewonnen)
new_classes.definition_en: Quality borne by a spirit beverage that has been produced exclusively by distillation of fermented mash of plums, pears or cherries, with no other raw materials permitted, as required for classification under CN subheadings 2208 90 33 and 2208 90 38.

coverage_explanation: The proposed axioms capture the three main discriminating criteria for CN 2208 90 33: (1) the spirit is obtained exclusively by distilling fermented mash of plums, pears or cherries (PlumPearCherryFruitMashDistillationProcess + PlumPearCherryFruitOriginQuality); (2) it is presented in containers ≤ 2 L (SmallContainer restriction); and (3) it belongs under SpiritsBeverages2208 (heading 2208 subheading 90). A small coverage gap remains: the legal text cross-references definitions of "plums" and "cherries" (mentioning that specific botanical/legal definitions apply), which cannot be fully captured in OWL without additional terminological detail. The sibling subheading 2208 90 38 (containers > 2 L) is deliberately NOT modelled here as it is a separate CN code. No regulatory individuals for measure types, footnotes or certificates specific to this subheading are present in the running TBox, so those cannot be referenced.
